from dotnet_ai_kit.models import DetectionSignal, DetectionScoreCard, DetectedProject
s = DetectionSignal\(pattern_name='Aggregate base', signal_type='code-pattern', target_project_type='command', confidence='high', weight=3, evidence='test.cs:10'\)
print\(f'Signal: {s.pattern_name} -> {s.target_project_type} \({s.confidence}\)'\)
sc = DetectionScoreCard\(project_type='command', positive_score=9.0, negative_score=1.0, net_score=8.0, signal_count=3\)
print\(f'Score: {sc.project_type} net={sc.net_score}'\)
p = DetectedProject\(mode='microservice', project_type='hybrid', confidence='high', confidence_score=0.92\)
print\(f'Project: {p.project_type} conf={p.confidence} score={p.confidence_score}'\)
print\('All models OK'\)
")

print\('output:', repr\(result.output\)\)

print\('has stderr:', hasattr\(result, 'stderr'\)\)
" 2>&1)

## Summary

- **Signal-based detection**: Replaced name-first detection with 24 code pattern signals, confidence scoring, hybrid type support, user override prompt, and progress spinner. Processor detection now based on handler behavior \(event forwarding\) not infrastructure presence \(IHostedService/ServiceBusProcessor\)
- **Permission fix**: Fixed JSON syntax from colon `Bash\(cmd:*\)` to official space `Bash\(cmd *\)`, added `$schema` validation, pre-flight tool availability check, AI guidance rule for sequential commands
- **Interactive configure**: Rich single-select menus, questionary multi-select checkboxes, `--no-input` flag for CI/CD, configuration summary table
- **CLI UX polish**: `--json`, `--dry-run`, `NO_COLOR`, Ctrl-C handling, stderr routing, exit code mapping, next-command suggestions \(per clig.dev guidelines\)
- **Plan generation**: Complexity analysis for conditional artifact generation, split plan command into command + skill files to stay within 200-line budget

## Changes

- 59 files changed, +5,058 / -496 lines
- 115 tests passing, 79% coverage
- Lint and format clean \(ruff\)

- [x] All 115 tests pass \(`pytest tests/ -q`\)
- [x] Detection tests: 44 tests covering all project types including hybrid, confidence scoring, multi-project solutions
- [x] CLI tests: 34 tests covering configure, --json, --dry-run, --no-input, exit codes, next-command suggestions
- [x] Lint clean \(`ruff check src/ tests/`\)
- [x] Format clean \(`ruff format --check src/ tests/`\)

- [ ] Manual test: run `dotnet-ai configure` and verify interactive menus work
